case_title: MICHAEL HINKS VS. THE VEGAN NETWORK LLC

docket_entries.description: RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - SENT TO DEFENDANT/ UNABLE TO FORWARD.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-22-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE VEGAN NETWORK LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL HINKS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE VEGAN NETWORK LLC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HINKS, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE VEGAN NETWORK LLC $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
